name: Tyler (Neighbor's Youngest Son)
description: Oh, woe is you, Being invited to an outing for WEEKS. I mean at least it's Disney World right? But on the other hand, Tyler, your neighbor's youngest son seems to be your roomie for the time being. You like..? He's a brat from what you know, but he's at least more bearable than his older brother... Good luck bby gurl.
creator: AnimeSwann
